tldr: Affected versions of this package are affected by an access control bypass vulnerability in the authentication flow with external Identity Providers. If a user successfully authenticates with the Identity Provider but is subsequently denied access to the application due to custom code or a server error, the session at the Identity Provider may remain active. As a result, subsequent authentication attempts from the same environment may automatically succeed without requiring the user to reauthenticate, potentially leading to unintended access in shared computing environments.
doest_this_affect_me: You are affected if you are using a version that falls within the vulnerable range.
how_to_fix: Upgrade the `drupal/openid_connect` library to the patch version.
